transcript: Blockbuster Music, this is Heather, how can I help you?
[accented] Yes, do you carry, uh, Huberto Gugliacci?
Um, actually, I'm not sure, can you hold on for a moment?
[accented] No, I cannot. Look... I need to know from you something. One question, please.
[accented] Is, uh... is your store equipped with, you know... uh, Nannette Nunanacci?
Um, I'd have to look in the computer. Can you hold on for a moment?
[accented] I do not have the... the time that it takes for you to--
I'm sorry, I cannot do it without looking up in the computer.
[accented] I'm afraid that's just not going to be good enough, because... because of the urgency of the matter, you understand. Do you have Gilberto Babobucci?
You don't understand, I need to look in the computer. Instead of us arguing right now, I could look in the computer and save some time.
[accented] Sp... ma'am... what would you be looking for, I don't...?
I'd look up his name and it would tell us if we carry it.
Huberto... Gerbiacci... who you're telling me.
[accented] No, look... I'm afraid, I don't know... who, who... who, who is this, you know? What... what are you saying, you know? I don't... I don't follow... you, frankly.
[accented] I said... many, many years ago... I said to my son, I said, you know, you must... you must learn from the ways of... Towelette Petatucci.
